name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/server-sqlite
description: MCP server for SQLite — query and manage SQLite databases

tools.name: read_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query on the SQLite database

tools.name: write_query
tools.description: Execute an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE query

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in the database

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the SQLite database

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get the schema of a specific table
